name: Almond Crisps with Amaretto-Glazed Almonds
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------DOUGH-----------------------------------
1 cup All-purpose flour
1 pinch Salt
1/2 cup Unsalted butter, at room temperature
1/2 cup Sugar
1 egg, at room temperature
2 tablespoons Amaretto liquor
Sugar (optional)
Powdered sugar (optional)
For almonds: Melt butter in a heavy small skillet over medium heat. Add almonds and amaretto and stir until almonds are golden brown, about 5 minutes. Cool on paper towels.
For dough: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Lightly grease 2 large baking sheets. Sift flour with salt into a small bowl. Using an electric mixer, cream butter with 1/2 cup sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Blend in egg and amaretto. Add flour mixture and mix until dough forms. The dough will be sticky.
Divide dough into 30 pieces. Roll each between palms into balls, dusting hands with flour if necessary. Set on baking sheets, spacing at least 2 inches apart.
Fill a small bowl with water and a separate bowl with sugar. Dip the bottom of a 2-1/2-inch round glass into water and then into sugar. Press the glass down onto one dough ball, flattening it into a 2-1/2 to 3-inch round. Repeat with remaining dough. Sprinkle rounds lightly with sugar.
Gently press several glazed almond slivers into each round in a flower pattern. Bake until edges of cookies are golden brown, 8 to 10 minutes. Cool on a rack. Just before serving, dust cookies with powdered sugar if desired.
